source.citation: Putukian M et al. Br J Sports Med 2023
source.encoding_scope: Published abstract, meta-analysis summary statistics, and Putukian main-text operational definitions (full text in GLP 2026-06-25). Per-study rows from fixed 23-paper hunt pilot only; Putukian supplemental included-study list (Table L) intentionally out of scope for this installment.

pooled_outcomes.putukian_operational_definition: Days until return to school/learn as defined by each contributing study (not harmonized to CISG step labels in the meta-analysis).
Days until return to sport as defined by each contributing study (not harmonized to CISG step labels in the meta-analysis).
Full RTL without new academic support by day 10.

putukian_review_operational_definitions.days_until_symptom_free: Complete resolution of symptoms at rest associated with the current concussion.
putukian_review_operational_definitions.days_until_RTL: Completion of the RTL strategy with return to pre-injury learning activities with no new academic support.
putukian_review_operational_definitions.days_until_full_RTS: Completion of the RTS strategy with no symptoms and no clinical findings at rest or maximal exertion suggesting inability to return.
putukian_review_operational_definitions.note: Putukian pooled means across 278 studies still use each contributor's operationalization — this is the review team's harmonization target, not proof that included studies matched it.

endpoint_alignment_with_cisg_amsterdam.cisg_amsterdam_anchor: RTL step 4 — full school day without accommodations [PMID 37316210]
endpoint_alignment_with_cisg_amsterdam.putukian_pooled_anchor: Full RTL without new academic support (proportion endpoint); mean days until RTL pools heterogeneous study definitions
endpoint_alignment_with_cisg_amsterdam.note: Putukian proportion endpoint is closer to CISG full RTL than to first return to class; mean RTL days mix early and full return definitions across 278 studies — primary driver of I² ≈ 99%.

endpoint_alignment_with_cisg_amsterdam.cisg_amsterdam_anchor: RTS step 6 — unrestricted return to sport [PMID 37316210]
endpoint_alignment_with_cisg_amsterdam.putukian_pooled_anchor: Days until RTS — study-specific (may be medical clearance, non-contact, or full play)
endpoint_alignment_with_cisg_amsterdam.note: Without step-level harmonization, meta-analytic RTS mean is not interchangeable with CISG step-6 completion.

endpoint_alignment_with_cisg_amsterdam.cisg_amsterdam_anchor: RTS ≥24 h/step only; RTL no time floor [grammar audit]
endpoint_alignment_with_cisg_amsterdam.putukian_pooled_anchor: Not modeled — pooling aggregates outcomes, not advancement rules
endpoint_alignment_with_cisg_amsterdam.note: Grammar ratio 1.50 (rule-derived) and Putukian mean ratio 2.39 measure different layers: document rules vs pooled heterogeneous endpoints.

interpretation_for_pillar2_005.why_i2_is_high: Putukian pooled 'days until RTL/RTS' without forcing a single CISG step definition across 278 studies.
interpretation_for_pillar2_005.why_grammar_ratio_differs_from_putukian_: Rule-derived 1.50 is an ideal CISG grammar bound; Putukian 2.39 reflects endpoint heterogeneity plus real-world step-backs and non-ideal courses.
interpretation_for_pillar2_005.dematteo_role: Youth staged-protocol medians (35/38 d) track full step completion in one cohort — explains near-parallel tracks (ratio 1.09), not fast meta-analytic means.

scope_boundary.rationale: Foundation Stack methods installment; fixed 23-paper hunt pilot substitutes for full 278-study re-coding.

future_glp_work.note: Optional: complete hunt pilot to 23/23 full-text rows; does not require Table L.
